meaning: 即DIMM印刷板上一块容量为2048bit的EPROM
examples: SPD chairman Kurt Beck had told Henrico Frank he would help him.
The SPD will now have to reinvent itself.
The SPD wants children to study longer together, reckoning that slower ones will benefit.
In Rhineland-Palatinate, the SPD's Kurt Beck is the only premier to govern without a coalition partner.
